---
name: First Playable Draft
about: Create first complete playable map draft
labels: [mapping]
---

## Objective
Produce the first full playable draft for initial target difficulty.

## Scope
- End-to-end map pass
- Foundational patterning and flow
- Basic quality/sync pass

## Checklist
- [ ] Complete full-song mapping (intro → outro)
- [ ] Ensure major song sections are represented (build/drop/transitions)
- [ ] Run initial sync check and correct obvious timing drift
- [ ] Remove broken/unplayable sections
- [ ] Remove clear unintended traps for target difficulty
- [ ] Add notes on known rough sections needing playtest focus

## Acceptance Criteria
- Draft is fully playable start-to-finish
- No blocker-level timing or pattern integrity issues
- Known weaknesses are documented with section timestamps

## Deliverables
- Draft files committed
- Short summary comment with:
  - [ ] Current quality status
  - [ ] Known issues
  - [ ] Requested playtest focus areas
